'''dhogasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vogueish|vogueish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vogueish|vogueish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhogasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhogasithi|dhogasithi]] || [[word:dhogasiji|dhogasiji]] || [[word:dhogasishi|dhogasishi]] || [[word:dhogasiki|dhogasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhogasuthuthu|dhogasuthuthu]] || [[word:dhogasujuju|dhogasujuju]] || [[word:dhogasushushu|dhogasushushu]] || [[word:dhogasukuku|dhogasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhogasuthu|dhogasuthu]] || [[word:dhogasuju|dhogasuju]] || [[word:dhogasushu|dhogasushu]] || [[word:dhogasuku|dhogasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhogasufthuf|dhogasufthuf]] || [[word:dhogasufjuf|dhogasufjuf]] || [[word:dhogasufshuf|dhogasufshuf]] || [[word:dhogasufkuf|dhogasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhogasethe|dhogasethe]] || [[word:dhogaseje|dhogaseje]] || [[word:dhogaseshe|dhogaseshe]] || [[word:dhogaseke|dhogaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhogasothotho|dhogasothotho]] || [[word:dhogasojojo|dhogasojojo]] || [[word:dhogasoshosho|dhogasoshosho]] || [[word:dhogasokoko|dhogasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhogasotho|dhogasotho]] || [[word:dhogasojo|dhogasojo]] || [[word:dhogasosho|dhogasosho]] || [[word:dhogasoko|dhogasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhogasofthof|dhogasofthof]] || [[word:dhogasofjof|dhogasofjof]] || [[word:dhogasofshof|dhogasofshof]] || [[word:dhogasofkof|dhogasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhogasïfthïf|dhogasïfthïf]] || [[word:dhogasïfjïf|dhogasïfjïf]] || [[word:dhogasïfshïf|dhogasïfshïf]] || [[word:dhogasïfkïf|dhogasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhogasïfthïfthïf|dhogasïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dhogasïfjïfjïf|dhogasïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dhogasïfshïfshïf|dhogasïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dhogasïfkïfkïf|dhogasïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhogasïfthïf|dhogasïfthïf]] || [[word:dhogasïfjïf|dhogasïfjïf]] || [[word:dhogasïfshïf|dhogasïfshïf]] || [[word:dhogasïfkïf|dhogasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhogasïfthïf|dhogasïfthïf]] || [[word:dhogasïfjïf|dhogasïfjïf]] || [[word:dhogasïfshïf|dhogasïfshïf]] || [[word:dhogasïfkïf|dhogasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhogasæthæ|dhogasæthæ]] || [[word:dhogasæjæ|dhogasæjæ]] || [[word:dhogasæshæ|dhogasæshæ]] || [[word:dhogasækæ|dhogasækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhogasathatha|dhogasathatha]] || [[word:dhogasajaja|dhogasajaja]] || [[word:dhogasashasha|dhogasashasha]] || [[word:dhogasakaka|dhogasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhogasatha|dhogasatha]] || [[word:dhogasaja|dhogasaja]] || [[word:dhogasasha|dhogasasha]] || [[word:dhogasaka|dhogasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhogasafthaf|dhogasafthaf]] || [[word:dhogasafjaf|dhogasafjaf]] || [[word:dhogasafshaf|dhogasafshaf]] || [[word:dhogasafkaf|dhogasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhogasasha|dhogasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhogashësha|dhogashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhogasrosha|dhogasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhogasmusha|dhogasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhogasyasha|dhogasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhogasnkshësha|godhogasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhogasnkrosha|godhogasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhogasnkmusha|godhogasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhogasnkyasha|godhogasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhogagasasha|dhogagasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhogagashësha|dhogagashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhogagasrosha|dhogagasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhogagasmusha|dhogagasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhogagasyasha|dhogagasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhogagasnkshësha|godhogagasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhogagasnkrosha|godhogagasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhogagasnkmusha|godhogagasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhogagasnkyasha|godhogagasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhegæsasha|dhegæsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhegæshësha|dhegæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhegæsrosha|dhegæsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhegæsmusha|dhegæsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhegæsyasha|dhegæsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhegæsnkshësha|godhegæsnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhegæsnkrosha|godhegæsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhegæsnkmusha|godhegæsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhegæsnkyasha|godhegæsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhogfasasha|dhogfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhogfashësha|dhogfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhogfasrosha|dhogfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhogfasmusha|dhogfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhogfasyasha|dhogfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhogfasnkshësha|godhogfasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhogfasnkrosha|godhogfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhogfasnkmusha|godhogfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhogfasnkyasha|godhogfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
